name: Which TV Show Character Are You?
description: Discover which famous TV or movie character best matches your personality traits and tendencies

strategicPlanner.title: The Strategic Planner
strategicPlanner.description: You're analytical, detail-oriented, and always thinking ahead. Like your TV counterparts, you excel at anticipating problems and developing solutions before others even see the challenge coming.
strategicPlanner.challenges: May sometimes overthink or miss spontaneous opportunities
strategicPlanner.exampleCharacters: Tyrion Lannister (Game of Thrones), Sherlock Holmes, Lisa Simpson

empatheticFriend.title: The Empathetic Friend
empatheticFriend.description: You're caring, emotionally aware, and always there for others. Like your TV counterparts, you understand people's feelings and provide the support they need in difficult times.
empatheticFriend.strengths: Emotional support, relationship building, conflict resolution
empatheticFriend.challenges: May sometimes prioritize others' needs over your own
empatheticFriend.exampleCharacters: Phoebe Buffay (Friends), Ted Lasso, Samwise Gamgee

boldAdventurer.title: The Bold Adventurer
boldAdventurer.description: You're courageous, spontaneous, and always ready for excitement. Like your TV counterparts, you thrive on taking risks and exploring new possibilities.
boldAdventurer.challenges: May sometimes act without considering consequences
boldAdventurer.exampleCharacters: Indiana Jones, Arya Stark, Jack Sparrow

principledLeader.title: The Principled Leader
principledLeader.description: You're strong-willed, morally grounded, and natural at taking charge. Like your TV counterparts, you inspire others through your integrity and decisive actions.
principledLeader.challenges: May sometimes be inflexible or overly rigid
principledLeader.exampleCharacters: Captain America, Daenerys Targaryen, Atticus Finch

questions.question: When facing a difficult situation, you typically:
options: Analyze all possibilities before making a move
Check in with others to see how they're feeling
Jump in and figure it out as you go
Stick to your principles regardless of pressure

questions.question: When facing a challenge, you prefer to:
options: Analyze the situation and devise a calculated plan
Lean on your close relationships and intuition
Take bold action and dive into adventure
Step up and lead with strong moral convictions

questions.question: Your ideal role in a team would be:
options: The strategist who outlines the plan
The supportive friend who keeps morale high
The daring explorer who takes risks
The decisive leader who guides the group

questions.question: In a crisis, you are most likely to:
options: Evaluate all options and create a tactical response
Offer emotional support and keep everyone calm
Charge into the unknown to find a solution
Take charge and make tough decisions immediately

questions.question: Which quality do you value most in a friend?
options: Intellectual foresight and planning
Empathy and genuine care
Courage and spontaneity
Integrity and leadership

questions.question: When making decisions, you rely most on:
options: Careful analysis and strategic thinking
Listening to your heart and those around you
Gut instincts and a willingness to take risks
A strong set of values and principles

questions.question: How do you react when plans change unexpectedly?
options: Quickly rework your strategy to adapt
Support others and maintain a calm demeanor
See it as an opportunity for a new adventure
Take decisive action to steer things back on course

questions.question: Which setting sounds most appealing to you?
options: A high-stakes strategy game among brilliant minds
A heartfelt gathering of close friends and family
An adventurous journey into uncharted territories
A leadership summit focused on making a positive impact
